problem id: a6f7139f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  01101010 -> 10000110
  10000010 -> 10001000
  00100010 -> 10000010
  11110010 -> 10001111
  11001011 -> 11001100
  10111010 -> 10001011
  11110110 -> 10001111
  11010100 -> 00001101

query: 00000111
predicted answer: 11000000
